description: Gold-set fixture for Phase 5 recall validation. Ten sanitized public-legal prompts that exercise the different retrieval surfaces (statute lookup, case law, legislation, CEB, current-law).

prompts.text: What are the elements of an enforceable premarital agreement under California Family Code § 1615?
Explain Probate Code § 859 double damages in the context of trustee self-dealing.
How does CCP § 2030.300 govern motions to compel supplemental interrogatory responses in civil litigation?
What duties does Corporations Code § 309 impose on California directors of a general stock corporation?
Summarize the undue-influence factors under Welfare and Institutions Code § 15610.70.
what new laws have been passed in 2026 in CA
what California bills about electric bicycles were active in 2025-2026
has California changed its lemon law procedures recently
Outline the fiduciary duty rules that apply to LLC managers under California Corporations Code § 17704.09.
What are the disclosure obligations for purchase and sale contracts for residential real estate in California?
